decisions.summary: Food and property portfolio grids will be refactored to a UNIFORM, aligned grid (not masonry). E
decisions.detail: Food and property portfolio grids will be refactored to a UNIFORM, aligned grid (not masonry). Every thumbnail is an equal 3:4 PORTRAIT tile, center-cropped (object-fit:cover). User initially said 4:3 but switched to 3:4 to better accommodate portrait source images. Applies to all images regardless of original orientation.

source_evidence.context: Discuss: grid refactor decision confirmed by user.

decisions.summary: The per-restaurant masonry config system (buildColumns, columnLayout, forcedRatio, photoOverride
decisions.detail: The per-restaurant masonry config system (buildColumns, columnLayout, forcedRatio, photoOverrides in galleryColumns) is to be refactored away / replaced as part of this change. Treat as a layout refactor.

source_evidence.context: Discuss: grid refactor decision confirmed by user.

decisions.summary: Grid uses ONE consistent responsive column count across both /foodphotography and /propertyphoto
decisions.detail: Grid uses ONE consistent responsive column count across both /foodphotography and /propertyphotography (and all sections): approx 2 columns mobile / 3 tablet / 4 desktop. Per-section columnCount/columnLayout config is removed. Center-crop anchor for 3:4 tiles is center (object-fit:cover default).

decisions.summary: Uniform 3:4 refactor: change GalleryGrid to render a responsive CSS grid from the flat `photos`
decisions.detail: Uniform 3:4 refactor: change GalleryGrid to render a responsive CSS grid from the flat `photos` array and DROP the `columns` prop. Lightbox already keys off `photos`, unaffected. Eliminates both buildColumns impls.

source_evidence.context: Discuss: blast-radius check of property page for the uniform 3:4 grid refactor.

decisions.summary: New GalleryGrid API: props become { photos: Photo[] } only (drop columns). Render a responsive g
decisions.detail: New GalleryGrid API: props become { photos: Photo[] } only (drop columns). Render a responsive grid using Tailwind classes grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 (2 mobile/3 tablet/4 desktop) with inline style gap clamp(6px,0.8vw,12px). Each tile: inline aspectRatio '3 / 4', overflow hidden, cursor pointer; img width/height 100% object-fit cover. Lightbox block unchanged.

source_evidence.context: Plan: concrete implementation decisions for the uniform 3:4 grid refactor.

decisions.summary: Photo type consolidation: delete galleryColumns.ts and import Photo from GalleryGrid in both pag
decisions.detail: Photo type consolidation: delete galleryColumns.ts and import Photo from GalleryGrid in both pages (GalleryGrid already exports Photo). Remove the now-dead forcedRatio field from the Photo type and all usages.

source_evidence.context: Plan: concrete implementation decisions for the uniform 3:4 grid refactor.

decisions.summary: Recommended fix (not yet applied; discuss mode is read-only): add webpack watchOptions.ignored t
decisions.detail: Recommended fix (not yet applied; discuss mode is read-only): add webpack watchOptions.ignored to next.config.ts excluding **/node_modules/**, **/.git/**, **/.pi/**, **/.cocoindex_code/**. If dev later uses --turbopack, use the turbopack-equivalent ignore instead since webpack() config is not used under turbopack.

source_evidence.context: Discuss: diagnosing endless 'Compiled in Xms (242 modules)' recompile loop in next dev console.

domain.summary: GalleryGrid.tsx already implements the click-to-reveal lightbox: fullscreen overlay with objectF
domain.detail: [implementation] GalleryGrid.tsx already implements the click-to-reveal lightbox: fullscreen overlay with objectFit:contain (uncropped full image), prev/next arrow buttons, keyboard nav (Arrow keys + Escape), and touch swipe. The 'reveal full image with no crop' requirement is already satisfied by existing code.

source_evidence.context: Discuss: changing food/property portfolio grids to uniform 4:3 thumbnails with uncropped full reveal on click. Grounding findings from reading code.

domain.summary: Current grid is a column-based MASONRY, not a uniform grid. app/foodphotography/page.tsx (and pr
domain.detail: [implementation] Current grid is a column-based MASONRY, not a uniform grid. app/foodphotography/page.tsx (and property) pass photos through buildColumns(photos, layout) from galleryColumns. Each restaurant has a per-section layout: columnLayout (explicit column assignments), columnCount, and photoOverrides.forcedRatio. By default thumbnails render at NATURAL aspect ratio (width:100%, height auto), so column heights stagger. Only cells with forcedRatio get aspectRatio + object-fit:cover.

source_evidence.context: Discuss: changing food/property portfolio grids to uniform 4:3 thumbnails with uncropped full reveal on click. Grounding findings from reading code.

domain.summary: User wants food (/foodphotography) and property (/propertyphotography) portfolio grid thumbnails
domain.detail: User wants food (/foodphotography) and property (/propertyphotography) portfolio grid thumbnails to be uniform/neat using a 4:3 aspect ratio (cropped), while clicking an image reveals the full uncropped image.

source_evidence.context: Discuss: changing food/property portfolio grids to uniform 4:3 thumbnails with uncropped full reveal on click. Grounding findings from reading code.

domain.detail: Lightbox uncropped full-image reveal on click must be preserved (already exists in GalleryGrid.tsx). Only the grid thumbnail layout changes.

domain.summary: Pages diverged on column-building. propertyphotography/page.tsx has its OWN inline buildColumns
domain.detail: [implementation] Pages diverged on column-building. propertyphotography/page.tsx has its OWN inline buildColumns (lines 72-107): switch on photos.length (16/14/9/6 -> preset splits; else 4-col branch injecting forcedRatio '2752/1536' on photo 3). Does NOT import galleryColumns. foodphotography/page.tsx imports buildColumns+GalleryLayout from ./galleryColumns with per-restaurant layout configs. Both feed GalleryGrid columns:Photo[][]+photos.

domain.summary: Project convention: heavy inline styles plus Tailwind utility classes (e.g. className 'hidden md
domain.detail: Project convention: heavy inline styles plus Tailwind utility classes (e.g. className 'hidden md:flex'). Use Tailwind only for the responsive column count (needs media queries); keep everything else inline to match existing style. Font via var(--font-bricolage); pages are black bg/white text.

domain.summary: Dev script is plain `next dev` (package.json:6) and next.config.ts is empty (no watchOptions.ign
domain.detail: [implementation] Dev script is plain `next dev` (package.json:6) and next.config.ts is empty (no watchOptions.ignored). Next 15.5 / React 19 / Tailwind v4. The Next dev watcher only excludes node_modules and .next by default; it does NOT honor .gitignore.

source_evidence.context: Discuss: diagnosing endless 'Compiled in Xms (242 modules)' recompile loop in next dev console.

domain.summary: LIKELY CAUSE (config-confirmed, not FS-watched): endless dev recompile loop is caused by a backg
domain.detail: [question] LIKELY CAUSE (config-confirmed, not FS-watched): endless dev recompile loop is caused by a background process writing files inside the project root that the Next watcher monitors. Candidates: .pi/memory/ (index.db, staging/*.json, bridge/ — written continuously by Pi bridge) and .cocoindex_code/ (ccc indexer, gitignored at .gitignore:43 but gitignore does not affect the watcher). Each write -> recompile. Need to confirm which writer is active via fswatch/lsof at build time.

source_evidence.context: Discuss: diagnosing endless 'Compiled in Xms (242 modules)' recompile loop in next dev console.
